title: Replace hardcoded provider identity in availability editor flow
description: Update providers app availability editor to derive provider identity from session/auth context, remove hardcoded provider fallback, and handle unauthorized or ownership mismatch states with deterministic UX.
acceptance_criteria: Availability screen no longer uses hardcoded provider ID
Session identity is the source of provider API calls in provider role flow
UI shows explicit recovery state for unauthorized/forbidden identity mismatch responses
